# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:coa_monarchy_trigger = {
	OR = {
		has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_chiefdom
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
	}
}

REPLACE:coa_nihilist_trigger = {
	has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_state_atheism
	NOR = {
		has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
		has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
	}
	ruler ?= {
		has_ideology = ideology:ideology_nihilist
    }
}

REPLACE:coa_def_kalmar_flag_trigger = {
	exists = scope:actor
	scope:actor ?= {
		OR = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			has_law = law_type:law_social_monarchy
		}
		was_formed_from = DEN
	}
}
